backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an esports backend with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both collections.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single change: updating the 'Founded' stat text in HeroSection.tsx to display '2026', with high confidence and linked to test REQ-28.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary catalog describing the purpose and recent changes of every frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color tokens for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA, including meta tags, manifest link, apple-touch-icon references, the React root div, and service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: Web App Manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, standalone display mode, theme colors, and two PWA icon sizes (192x192 and 512x512).
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy with background refresh for GET requests, skipping cross-origin and /api/ calls, and falling back to index.html for offline navigation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, and LandingPage in a full-height dark-themed wrapper.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel with red overlay, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood).
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Card component for a single announcement that formats a nanosecond ICP timestamp, displays title and body excerpt, and reveals a 'Read More' indicator on hover.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand logo/avatar, social media icon links, quick navigation links, contact info section, and a caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for Legend X Esports with a background image, overlays, animated accents, main title, tagline, CTA buttons, and key stats.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, a 'Visit Website' external CTA button, and scroll-based background blur effect.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: News and announcements section that fetches data via useAnnouncements hook and renders AnnouncementCards with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Displays a single player's avatar, name, and role in a styled card with hover effects, a default fallback avatar, and a role badge overlay.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling both the native beforeinstallprompt event and iOS Safari fallback with Urdu instructions.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Roster section that fetches team members via useRoster hook and renders a responsive grid of PlayerCards with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members from the backend canister actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for the dark esports theme and utility classes for glows, metallic effects, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the public-facing landing page by assembling Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer section components.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with esports color tokens, custom fonts, glow box-shadows, and animation keyframes using typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's versioned state, existing features, known issues, and architectural notes for the Legend X Esports app build.
